title: RispwindPack FORGE
description: A collection of all Rispwind Mods, alongside Just Enough Items for recipe browsing.
body:
A mod collection including all current Forge mods created by me, Rispwind.

Features extra paintings, obsidian tools, access to the Deep Dark portal, a mining dimension, an adorable new mob, a new biome, returning features from April Fools' snapshots, spawn eggs in trades, and a powerful post-game weapon.

Also comes bundled with Just Enough Items for convenience.
